article_title: Regul. of Traffic By Pub. Authorities & Commissions
text: This article shall not apply with respect to any portion of the New York state thruway located within a city having a population in excess of one million.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 8
#### Article 38. Regul. of Traffic By Pub. Authorities & Commissions
##### § 1632 — Application of article

This article shall not apply with respect to any portion of the New York state thruway located within a city having a population in excess of one million.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: This article shall not apply with respect to any portion of the New York state thruway located within a city having a population in excess of one million.
